mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_info (favorite_id, user_id, product_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{favoriteId}, #{userId}, #{productId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM favorite_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM favorite_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorite_info WHERE product_id = #{productId}
